Off Calendar Nov-23-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Michael Imfeld, Esq., 415-491-8900 for plaintiff and moving party Circle Bank
Matt Malone, Esq. of Bending & Weil LLP, 925-838-2090 for defendant and opposing party 146 Portola Association
Michael Ching, Esq. of Cannata, Ching & O'Toole LLP, 415-409-8900 for defendant and opposing party Carlos Baena

Ruling:
Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling:
Plaintiff Circle Bank'S Motion For An Order Appointing Receiver IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. SUBSTANTIAL WORK HAS BEEN COMPLETED AND A RECEIVER IS NOT NECESSARY AT THIS TIME. Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797 (302/CWW)

PLAINTIFF CIRCLE BANK'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER APPOINTING RECEIVER.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - continued to November 19, 2010. Each party may submit a brief by November 17, 2010, no longer than 5 pages that sets forth what work has been done on the premises.
